summary: An adolescent pregnant female who experienced non-consensual intercourse requires thorough medical care including potential evidence gathering for justice; however, it appears no specific procedure listed as an option precludes this from happening without significant justification beyond what was provided initially regarding her age and condition at conception/gestation stage.
